objective: Operationalize the Chroma path fix by adding a repeatable verification script that proves /health and direct Chroma counts stay aligned for lariel_site_kb.
required_validation: Create a script in ~/mide-pilot/pilot_v1/scripts named verify_site_kb_consistency.sh
Script checks /health on 127.0.0.1:8091 and extracts documents count
Script checks direct Chroma count from site_kb_chromadb/lariel_site_kb
Script exits 0 only when counts match and health status=ok
Script exits non-zero when mismatch or error occurs
Run script and capture one successful execution output
execution_instructions: Run script at least once and capture output
Write pilot_v1/results/TASK-0006.result.json with transcript and pass/fail details
git commit -m 'worker: add TASK-0006 consistency verifier and result'
commands_expected: git commit -m 'worker: add TASK-0006 consistency verifier and result'
